# Ubiquiti airMAX Real Redacted Captures

Place reviewed `real_redacted` SNMP, airMAX status, or UISP API samples here
only after running `tools/redact_device_capture.py` and manual review.

Do not add UniFi captures to this adapter folder; UniFi is a distinct product
family and is not supported by the airMAX adapter.

No real captures are currently committed.
